fields.acceptance_criteria: agent-core implements a ReAct state machine (prompt/tool/observe/decide/act) and ONE session model supporting interactive and autonomous modes; promotion interactive->loop preserves session id + history; loop runs on a supervised isolated tokio runtime.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH2] Core loop state machine + unified session/mode model
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-core. Primary: cargo test -p agent-core (state transitions, mode promotion preserves identity/history, throttle). Manual: none. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
